dataListHardChecks.rule: Every generated data list must preserve the native system Title field and must not use a generated Text0 primary field.
DisplayName, FieldName, and InternalName must be unique; InternalName must be safe; FieldName suffix must match FieldIndex; storage family must match FieldType.
Single-select, multi-select, radio, checkbox, and tag fields must include non-empty option values.
Lookup fields must target an included list and must select a display field that resolves on the target list, normally Title.
Every generated data list must include a default view with visible fields and Title first.
Sample data must seed parent lists before related lists, and lookup values must reference seeded parent row IDs.
